name: Exfiltrate an AMI by Sharing It
description: Simulates an attacker sharing an EBS snapshot with an external AWS account to exfiltrate data. The snapshot can then be mounted in the attacker's account to access its contents.
prerequisites: EBS volume (1 GB) and a snapshot of it
detection_signal: ec2:ModifySnapshotAttribute in CloudTrail with createVolumePermission action adding an external account
